title: Quiz final — Small talk et premiers mots

questions.question: 'Good, cheers! You?' is a response to:
questions.explanation: Réponse naturelle et britannique à 'How are you?'

questions.question: 'Cheers' can mean:
questions.explanation: Cheers est ultra-polyvalent en anglais britannique.

questions.question: 'Fancy a drink?' means:
questions.explanation: Fancy + nom = ça te dit un/une... ?

questions.question: 'Ta' in British slang means:
questions.explanation: 'Ta' = merci en argot (surtout nord de l'Angleterre).

questions.question: 'Hiya' compared to 'Hi' is:
questions.explanation: Hiya = version plus chaleureuse et informelle de Hi.

questions.question: 'Lovely to meet you' is:
questions.explanation: Lovely to meet you = enchanté (chaleureux, naturel).

questions.question: 'What do you do?' asks about:
questions.explanation: What do you do? = quel est ton métier ?

questions.question: 'Whereabouts are you from?' means:
questions.explanation: Whereabouts = d'où exactement.

questions.question: 'Not bad' in British English means:
questions.explanation: Understatement : 'not bad' = plutôt bien, voire très bien.

questions.question: 'Mate' means:
questions.explanation: Mate = pote/ami. 'Alright, mate?' = salut, ça va ?

questions.question: 'See you later' means:
questions.explanation: See you later = au revoir (pas forcément plus tard).

questions.question: Which is more polite?
questions.explanation: Could I = plus poli que Can I.

questions.question: 'Brilliant!' means:
questions.explanation: Brilliant = super/génial. Très courant au UK.

questions.question: 'Proper good' means:
questions.explanation: Proper = vraiment (argot UK).

questions.question: Small talk is:
questions.explanation: Small talk = conversation légère (météo, week-end).

questions.question: 'How's it going?' expects:
questions.explanation: C'est une salutation, pas une vraie question.

questions.question: 'I reckon' means:
questions.explanation: I reckon = je pense/crois. Très britannique.

questions.question: 'Right' at the start of a sentence means:
questions.explanation: 'Right' en début de phrase = bon, alors.

questions.question: 'Lovely' in British English means:
questions.explanation: Lovely = super/génial. Très britannique et polyvalent.

questions.question: 'Ta-ra!' means:
questions.explanation: Ta-ra = au revoir en argot du nord de l'Angleterre.
